description_long: This object is a small, lifelike bird with a plump body and a short, rounded tail. Its plumage is primarily olive-brown on the back and wings, with lighter, creamy white underparts and a subtle yellowish wash on the tail and wing edges. The bird has a short, conical beak and a distinct patch of orange-red on its throat and upper chest, reminiscent of a European Robin. Its wings are detailed with faint striping and a mix of brown and yellow hues, while the legs are short and dark. The eyes are round and black, giving the bird a gentle, alert expression. The overall finish is matte with a slightly textured surface, suggesting a ceramic or resin construction.
description: A small, plump bird with olive-brown upperparts, creamy underparts, and an orange-red throat patch, featuring a short tail and conical beak.
description_view_0: The back and left side of the bird are visible, showing the rounded body, olive-brown plumage, and the subtle yellow on the tail.
description_view_1: The left profile highlights the bird's head, dark eye, and the transition from brown to lighter underparts, with the tail extending back.
description_view_2: The right side and partial front are visible, displaying the orange-red throat patch, creamy belly, and detailed wing pattern.
description_view_3: The front and right side of the bird are shown, emphasizing the orange-red throat, conical beak, and the bird's alert facial expression.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid olive-brown upperparts with a distinct orange-red throat patch and creamy white underparts; faint striping on wings
